dctools 0.0.0.9000

dctools: Reusable Utilities and Project Scaffolding for Biostatistics Research

Source: R/dctools-package.R
dctools-package.Rd

A personal toolkit of repeated-task helpers for prediction- and causal-inference research in R: project scaffolding (create_project()), package and parallel-controller management, data validation, PHI-safe output handling, clinical formulas, and house plotting/table defaults. Data manipulation follows a dplyr-first grammar; large-data backends (arrow, dbplyr) reuse the same verbs.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/imbroglio-dc/helpers

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/imbroglio-dc/helpers/issues
